shorts.title_distilled: American Water and Essential Utilities merger discussed.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A potential merger that could affect millions of utility customers is hearing from the people tonight. The Public Utility Commission (PUC) was at the Radisson in Scranton Thursday, taking input from the public on a proposed merger between American Water and Essential Utilities. Together, the companies serve millions of customers [...]

shorts.title: University students create cars for kids with disabilities
shorts.title_distilled: University students create cars for kids with disabilities.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Students across 11 different majors at the University of Scranton are putting what they learn in the classroom to work, helping children with many physical and mental disabilities. Students are creating nearly 20 specialized cars for children with physical and mental disadvantages. The goal is to bring equality to playtime. [...]

shorts.title: Man charged after shot fired in apartment building
shorts.title_distilled: Man charged after shot fired in apartment building.
shorts.description: LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A shots-fired investigation in Lackawanna County put many residents in danger Monday afternoon. Officers say a bullet traveled from a downstairs apartment into the ceiling and floor above, where residents were home at the time. 43‑year‑old Michael Sheridan now faces multiple charges, including reckless endangerment, after admitting that the gun accidentally [...]
